short_definition: The declarative Site Operating Loop policy object that describes cadence, triggers, observations, emissions, and evidence shape.
description: LoopDefinition is the first-class semantic object for the governing loop definition, distinct from the runtime host and from a single Loop Run. It names which Site control routine exists, what it observes, what it may emit, and how recurring execution is bounded.
boundaries: Not a source adapter or a prompt string.

authority.notes: The package owns the runtime host and loop-module validation; the concept names the durable loop definition.

examples: mailbox arrival watch wakes a bounded loop run

confidence.basis: The Site Operating Loop docs and runtime contract already define the governing loop semantics separately from substrate.
